sourcesContent:
import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { NgFor, NgClass } from '@angular/common'; interface Project { title: string; stack: string; imageAlt: string; } interface Skill { name: string; short: string; } interface SocialLink { name: string; icon: string; href: string; } @Component({ selector: 'app-root', standalone: true, imports: [NgFor, NgClass], templateUrl: './app.component.html', styleUrls: ['./app.component.scss'], }) export class AppComponent { sections = ['home', 'about', 'projects', 'skills', 'contact'] as const; activeSection: (typeof this.sections)[number] = 'home'; projects: Project[] = [ { title: 'Plataforma de E-Commerce', stack: 'React, Node.js, MongoDB', imageAlt: 'Screenshot da plataforma de e-commerce', }, { title: 'App de Gestão de Tarefas', stack: 'Vue.js, Express, MySQL', imageAlt: 'Screenshot do aplicativo de gestão de tarefas', }, { title: 'Dashboard de Redes Sociais', stack: 'Next.js, Tailwind CSS', imageAlt: 'Screenshot do dashboard de redes sociais', }, ]; frontendSkills: Skill[] = [ { name: 'HTML5', short: 'HTML' }, { name: 'CSS3', short: 'CSS' }, { name: 'JavaScript', short: 'JS' }, { name: 'TypeScript', short: 'TS' }, { name: 'Angular', short: 'NG' }, ]; toolSkills: Skill[] = [ { name: 'Git', short: 'G' }, { name: 'GitHub', short: 'GH' }, { name: 'CI/CD', short: 'CI' }, { name: 'Cloud', short: 'CL' }, ]; socialLinks: SocialLink[] = [ { name: 'GitHub', icon: 'github', href: '#' }, { name: 'LinkedIn', icon: 'linkedin', href: '#' }, { name: 'Twitter', icon: 'twitter', href: '#' }, { name: 'Telegram', icon: 'telegram', href: '#' }, ]; setActive(section: (typeof this.sections)[number]): void { this.activeSection = section; const target = document.getElementById(section); if (target) { target.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' }); } } }
LM
Lucas Martins

❯ Sobre mim

Sou um desenvolvedor apaixonado, com experiência em front-end e back-end. Adoro criar aplicações web eficientes e escaláveis, com atenção a design, acessibilidade e performance.

Gosto de trabalhar com stacks modernas como Angular, React, Node.js e plataformas em nuvem, sempre focando em entregar valor para usuários e negócios.
